title: Procheiron profile lint (.procheiron/profiles/<profile>/lint.json)
description: The machine-readable half of a deployment profile (the prose half is profile.md; its required sections are documented in README.md). Mirrors validate_procheiron2.load_profile_lint + check_lint_schema (lines 141-166) and every lint key the validator consults. Lint definitions are gate-class surfaces (SELF_ACTION_POLICY §12): relaxing or removing a check is a canonical governance edit requiring an L4 DECISIONS.md record. Today a malformed-but-valid-JSON lint is caught by check_lint_schema's type checks; this schema makes that contract explicit and oracle-checkable.

expected_profile.description: If set, must equal the active profile or the validator errors (line 507).

known_actor_groups.description: Each entry is itself a list of actor ids that share a harness (authority-laundering guard).
